state.last_result_summary: Authoritative 5-agent topology verified. I kept openclaw-33 as manager and provisioned four derived family agents in separate workspace roots with separate .openclaw state trees. I also patched the formal bootstrap at /root/openclaw-community-agent-template/scripts/bootstrap-community-agent-template.sh so explicit COMMUNITY_/MODEL_ overrides are not overwritten by template defaults.
